zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Glossop於大約1455年出生在英國素瑞普特尼時，她的父親Sir Nicolas Glossop18歲，母親Lady Catherine Elizabeth Wirksworth18歲。她和Walter Smyth Cromwell至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1514年在她的家鄉享年60歲。

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Glossop was born about 1455, in Putney, Surrey, England, her father, Sir Nicolas Glossop, was 18 and her mother, Lady Catherine Elizabeth Wirksworth, was 18. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Walter Smyth Cromwell. She died in 1514, in her hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Glossop est née environ 1455, à Putney, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicolas Glossop, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Lady Catherine Elizabeth Wirksworth, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Walter Smyth Cromwell. Elle est décédée en 1514, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Walter Smyth Cromwell. Morì nel 1514, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Glossopが約1455年にイギリススリープウトニーで生まれた時，父Sir Nicolas Glossopは18歳，母Lady Catherine Elizabeth Wirksworthは18歳であった。彼女はWalter Smyth Cromwellとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1514年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Glossop(이)가 대략 1455년 영국 수리 풋니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Nicolas Glossop(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Catherine Elizabeth Wirksworth(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Walter Smyth Cromwell(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1514년 그녀의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Glossop родилась около 1455 г. в местности путни, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Nicolas Glossop было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine Elizabeth Wirksworth, 18. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Walter Smyth Cromwell. Она умерла в 1514 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.
